  in <201306281249.r5SCns8k032302@oldred.freebsd.org>:

br> curl fails to build because it is marked as vulnerable:

 Here is a patch:

  http://people.allbsd.org/~hrs/FreeBSD/curl-7.31.0_20130628-1.diff

 Please test this.

-- Hiroki
